name: Agent Runtime
commonFailureModes: WebSocket event schemas belong in packages/protocol before runtime adapter changes.
Agent Runtime auth failure events should use shared provider failure reasons.
Runtime errors that represent retryable provider outages should not collapse into auth_failed.
Protocol changes should inspect Mobile chat behavior and Desktop capture/session assumptions.
reviewHints: Protocol changes should inspect Mobile, Desktop, and Control Plane assumptions.
Provider/auth changes should inspect runtime_error mapping and connection lifecycle behavior.
